title: List Nth
description: Define a linked list ADT with Nil and Cons(Int, List) constructors. Write a function that returns the nth element (0-indexed), or -1 if the index is out of bounds. The decreases clause should be on the list parameter.
notes: list_nth(lst, n): @Nat.0=n, @List.0=lst. decreases(@List.0) because the list gets shorter. Inside Cons(@Int, @List), the index @Nat.0 remains unchanged. The agent must use 0-1 for -1 since there's no unary minus on literals.
